projects.question: What challenges did you face while building your project?
How would you scale your project?
What would you improve if you rebuilt the project today?
How did you test your application?
How would your architecture change if one million users started using your application tomorrow?
What trade-offs did you make while building your project?
How did you optimize your application's performance?
What security vulnerabilities did you consider?
If your production server suddenly crashed, how would you investigate it?
